summary: FIDUS Franchise Portal Phase 2 - Complete testing of franchise admin authentication, dashboard APIs, and all 9 portal tabs. All 17 backend tests pass. All UI tabs render correctly with proper data and empty states.
seed_data_creation: Using existing Test Franchise Co company with 0 clients, 0 agents, $0 AUM
context_for_next_testing_agent: Franchise Portal Phase 2 is fully functional. All authentication, dashboard, and tab features work correctly. The company 'Test Franchise Co' has a 60/40 commission split. Since the company has no clients or agents yet, the Clients, Referrals, and Commissions tabs show empty states which is expected behavior.

authentication.POST /api/franchise/auth/login: PASS - Returns token, admin data, company data
authentication.Invalid credentials handling: PASS - Returns 401 with proper error message

dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/overview: PASS - Returns company stats, monthly projections
dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/portfolio: PASS - Returns fund type BALANCE, returns breakdown
dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/clients: PASS - Returns filtered client list (0 clients)
dashboard_endpoints.GET /api/franchise/dashboard/agents: PASS - Returns filtered agent list (0 agents)

ui_tabs.Overview: PASS - Shows KPI cards, monthly projections, company details
ui_tabs.Fund Portfolio: PASS - Shows BALANCE fund type, returns breakdown, contract terms (14mo, 2mo incubation, quarterly)
ui_tabs.Cash Flow: PASS - Shows investment breakdown, monthly projections
ui_tabs.Instruments: PASS - Shows 50 instruments with symbol, leverage (200:1), contract size, pip size
ui_tabs.Risk Parameters: PASS - Shows all risk values (1%, 3%, 6%, 10%, 25%, 200:1) and risk score labels
ui_tabs.Gap Analysis: PASS - Shows AUM growth targets, revenue at scale projections
ui_tabs.Commissions: PASS - Shows 60%/40% commission split, empty transactions

features_verified.logout: PASS - Clears tokens and returns to login page
features_verified.multi_tenant_filtering: PASS - All data filtered by company_id from JWT
